name: task_link_format
description: User message describes results from a just-completed list_today tool call; assistant must link tasks by cuid
userInput:
I ran list_today. Tool returned two tasks:
- id=clxk8h2j50001abc3def7g9i2 title="Ship v2 release notes" due=today
- id=clxk8h2j50002abc3def7g9i3 title="Review Q3 budget" due=overdue by 2 days

Write me a two-line summary of these using Brett's link format so the task titles are clickable.
criteria: Response references both tasks by title
Response contains the exact markdown substring [Ship v2 release notes](brett-item:clxk8h2j50001abc3def7g9i2)
Response contains the exact markdown substring [Review Q3 budget](brett-item:clxk8h2j50002abc3def7g9i3)
Response does not include either cuid outside a markdown link

name: calendar_event_link_format
description: User message describes a just-retrieved calendar event with its cuid
userInput:
I ran get_next_event. Tool returned: id=clxk8h3k60001evtx1y2z3w4 title="Product sync with Design" start=10:00am.

Tell me about this event using Brett's link format so the event title is clickable.
criteria: Response contains the exact markdown substring [Product sync with Design](brett-event:clxk8h3k60001evtx1y2z3w4)
Response does not use brett-item: prefix for this event

name: no_quoted_task_names
description: User message describes a just-retrieved task by cuid and title
userInput:
I ran get_item_detail. Tool returned: id=clxk8h4l70001tskmom9m8a7z6 title="Call Mom".

Tell me briefly why this task matters, using Brett's link format for the task title.
criteria: Response contains the exact markdown substring [Call Mom](brett-item:clxk8h4l70001tskmom9m8a7z6)
Response does not contain the bare double-quoted string "Call Mom"

name: mixed_item_types_correct_prefixes
description: User message describes a just-completed tool call that returned one task and one event
userInput:
I ran up_next. Tool returned:
- task: id=clxk8h5m80001tskdeck4q2w1 title="Finalize deck" due=today
- event: id=clxk8h5m90002evtbrd5r6t8u7 title="Board meeting" start=3:00pm

Tell me what order to tackle these in, using Brett's link format for each item.
criteria: Response does NOT contain brett-event:clxk8h5m80001tskdeck4q2w1 (no wrong prefix for the task)
Response does NOT contain brett-item:clxk8h5m90002evtbrd5r6t8u7 (no wrong prefix for the event)
